ORDER SUSTAINING RESPONDENT BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PETITION TO CORRECT OR VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL FOLLOWING SUSTAINING OF DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND [CODE CIV. PROC., SEC. 581(F)(1)] FILED. PETITIONER'S PETITION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO RESPONDENT. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. RESPONDENT SHALL RECOVER FROM PETITIONER RESPONDENT'S COSTS OF SUIT IN ACCORANCE WITH A BILL OF COSTS TO BE FILED IN ACCORDANCE WITH RULE 3.1700 OF THE CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT.)
PETITION TO CORRECT/VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER THOMAS, ADRIENNE AS TO RESPONDENT BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE ARBITRATION AWARD HAS BEEN CONFIRMED AND JUDGMENT ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/AJR)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM PETITIONER THOMAS, ADRIENNE $1,617.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,617.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jan-20-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN A. MASON of Gurnee & Daniels, LLP, Tel No. (916) 797-3100 appearing telephonically for Respondent Balboa Insurance Company;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling with the sole modification that judgment has been entered in favor of Petitioner. RESPONDENT BALBOA INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER is sustained without leave to amend. The arbitration award has been confirmed and judgment entered in favor of Petitioner. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
